schema_changelog.compatibility: additive — all v1.0.0 paths preserved verbatim so reel-plan.ts resolveProductionPlan() resolves identically; ffmpeg pipeline is unchanged. v2.1 fields are descriptive metadata consumed by validate-reel.ts and (future) the Remotion compiler. No CLI strings, no executable instructions live in this JSON.
schema_changelog.law: TELEMETRY 014 controls geometry; RUST REMIX controls finish. Geometry (frame_geometry, segment IDs, timestamps, pacing_lock) is locked and validated. Finish (color, grain, aberration, surface treatment) is the only creative variable per reel.

reel_input.note: Human-authored seed that the compiler expands into the full instance below. Descriptive only.
reel_input.concept_seed: Telemetry lock — the moment a drifting system is captured by its own measurement and forced back onto its true vector.
reel_input.doctrine_theme: Measurement is not judgment. It is the precondition of correction.
must_include: no banned cliches (unlock, journey, potential-as-noun-promise, transform)

concept: Telemetry lock — drift is not failure; drift is unmeasured motion. A system without telemetry does not know it is falling. The instant you instrument the truth — heart rate, ledger, vector, the cold number — the system stops lying to itself and snaps back onto its corrected line. Measurement is the precondition of correction.
core_metaphor: A monolithic steel guidance gantry drifting silently off-axis in a black void — until a gold telemetry lattice ignites across it, measures the deviation in hard numbers, and forcibly re-vectors the structure back onto its true line.
emotional_arc: drifting → unaware → instrumented → confronted → re-vectored → locked
quote: Measurement is not judgment. It is the precondition of correction.

frame_geometry.note: Locked geometry (TELEMETRY 014 law). validate-reel.ts enforces these exactly for engine_version 2.1.0.
frame_geometry.segment_id_order_note: Five canonical named beats in locked order. Validator checks these five segment IDs are present, in order, with continuous 0:00->0:45 timestamps.
frame_geometry.runway_prompt_char_budget_note: The active engine (lib/scene-planning.ts MAX_RUNWAY_PROMPT_CHARS) truncates promptText to 1000 chars before sending to Runway gen4.5. Per-segment visual_prompt must stay <= 1000 chars or it is silently clipped. This corrects the earlier 512 figure, which does not match this repo.

first_frame_hook.note: Descriptive. The 0.0s-1.5s frame must arrest the scroll before audio registers.
first_frame_hook.visual: A single razor-thin gold telemetry vector cutting diagonally across absolute black, terminating on a sliver of steel that is visibly off its grid line by a measurable gap.
first_frame_hook.fail_condition: Any ambient drift, any logo, any fade-in. The first frame is already mid-tension.

pacing_lock.note: Locked. Voiceover delivery rate forces kinetic visuals — see kinetic_note.

mobius_loop.description: Voiceover ends on an incomplete grammatical clause. On loop 2, '...the number was always...' flows directly into 'telling you the truth.' — completing the circuit across the seam. The viewer is mid-sentence before they register the restart.
mobius_loop.loop_seam: ...the number was always... [LOOP] ...telling you the truth.
mobius_loop.visual_seam: mobius_close final frame — a pristine steel gantry locked perfectly on its gold vector line — matches hook opening frame's geometry, but the hook frame shows the SAME gantry drifted off the line. The loop reveals the drift was the consequence of stopping. Same macro angle, same void, same lattice position.

audio_design.final_segment_treatment: The word 'always' trails into dead silence with zero terminal inflection. ElevenLabs final segment override: stability 0.55, style 0.0 to suppress all resolution cues.
audio_design.music_fade: Telemetry pulse-bass drops to a single sustained sub-tone at 0:41, cuts at 0:45 — flowing directly into the lattice-ignition stab at 0:00 of loop 2.

visual_prompt.primary_prompt: 9:16 vertical cinematic sequence. Hard-surface structural CAD mechanics — absolute zero fluid simulation. NEVER simulate liquid, pouring, morphing, or organic forms. The world is a monolithic raw steel guidance gantry in absolute black (#0A0A0A) void. Three color states only: cold steel (#8A8F98) structure; sharp gold (#C6A94F) telemetry lattice, vector lines, and HUD numeric readouts; bone-white (#F5F2EB) datapoint flares and technical text zones. Surfaces are geometric: flat planes, crisp 90-degree edges, exact mechanical tolerances. Telemetry manifests as razor-sharp 1px gold grid lines with glitch artifacts — diagnostic overlays, not glowing halos. Camera work is aggressive: extreme macro velocity tracking, impossible internal structural angles, hyper-speed snap cuts. No slow drifts. No ambient rotation. Every clip has explicit directional kinetic energy. 4K vertical.
visual_prompt.runway_prompt_modifier: hard-surface structural CAD mechanics, monolithic steel guidance gantry, gold telemetry lattice and vector lines, HUD numeric readout, absolute black void, zero fluid simulation, macro velocity tracking, industrial kinetic, aggressive snap cuts

global_visual_matrix.rendering_engine: Hard-surface structural CAD mechanics. Absolute zero fluid simulation. No liquid, no morphing, no organic forms.
anti_drift_rules: NEVER generate liquid metal, molten material, or pouring effects
NEVER generate floating spheres, orbs, or rotating abstract assets
NEVER generate slow ambient camera drift without explicit directional purpose
ALWAYS render steel as hard angular geometry with crisp edges
ALWAYS render telemetry as razor-sharp 1px gold lattice with glitch artifacts
ALWAYS include explicit kinetic camera movement in every clip

chromatic_aberration.intensity: aggressive — 3-4px RGB channel split on re-vector lock events; 1px baseline on gold grid lines
chromatic_aberration.note: Aberration spikes on every lattice-ignition and lock event. Reinforces structural correction.

film_grain.grain_type: digital noise — matched to HUD aesthetic, never film stock

script.full_text: telling you the truth. Look at your trajectory. You think you're holding the line. You aren't. You are drifting, and the drift feels like stillness because nothing is measuring it. A system without telemetry doesn't know it is falling—it just falls, smoothly, silently, off its true vector. Then the number arrives. Heart rate. The ledger. The cold readout you avoided. Measurement is not judgment. It is the precondition of correction. The instant the lattice ignites, the lie ends. The structure snaps back onto its line. You were never lost. You were just unmeasured. And the number was always
script.mobius_note: The final word 'always' is an open clause. No grammatical resolution. No period. Must render as a thought interrupted, not a sentence completing. On loop, 'the number was always' flows into 'telling you the truth.' — completing the sentence across the loop boundary. ElevenLabs must render 'always' as trailing suspension, not conclusion.

segments.text: telling you the truth. Look at your trajectory. You think you're holding the line. You aren't.
segments.visual_prompt: Extreme close-up macro velocity tracking shot — camera accelerating laterally past the edge of a massive geometric raw steel guidance gantry in cold steel grey (#8A8F98). The camera locks on a section where a single razor-thin gold (#C6A94F) telemetry vector line cuts diagonally across the frame — and the steel edge is visibly off the line by a measurable gap. A small gold HUD numeric readout flickers beside the gap, incrementing. The drift looks like stillness: zero visible motion of the structure itself, only the camera moves. Background: absolute black (#0A0A0A) void — no ambient light. Sharp gold lines glitch with 2-frame artifacts at irregular intervals. Zero rotation. Pure lateral velocity arrest into locked macro. Mood: the forensic discovery of an unmeasured deviation. hard-surface structural CAD mechanics, monolithic steel guidance gantry, gold telemetry vector, HUD numeric readout, absolute black void, zero fluid simulation, macro velocity tracking, industrial kinetic

segments.text: You are drifting, and the drift feels like stillness because nothing is measuring it. A system without telemetry doesn't know it is falling—it just falls, smoothly, silently, off its true vector.
segments.visual_prompt: Impossible structural interior camera angle — the camera moves through a narrow internal channel of the steel gantry, walls of cold grey (#8A8F98) flat planes on either side. The whole structure is sliding silently off-axis: the parallel gold (#C6A94F) reference lines on the walls slowly diverge from the structure's edges, the gap widening — but the camera's smooth tracking makes the drift feel like calm forward motion. Bone-white (#F5F2EB) datapoint flares mark each measurement node along the wall, but they are dim, unlit, dormant. Gold HUD vectors attempt to measure the gap and read 'NO SIGNAL'. The top of the channel is a distant vanishing point in absolute black (#0A0A0A) void. Mood: the seduction of smooth, unmeasured descent. impossible interior structural angle, silent off-axis drift, dim dormant datapoint flares, gold reference lines diverging, NO SIGNAL HUD readout, absolute black void column, zero fluid simulation

segments.text: Then the number arrives. Heart rate. The ledger. The cold readout you avoided. Measurement is not judgment. It is the precondition of correction.
segments.visual_prompt: Hyper-speed visual transition — SNAP CUT: a blindingly sharp gold (#C6A94F) telemetry lattice flash-ignites across the entire gantry surface simultaneously — a grid of 1px-wide orthogonal lines detonating from center outward. On ignition: every dormant bone-white (#F5F2EB) datapoint flare lights at once, each a 3-4px burst lasting 2 frames. Hard gold numeric readouts cascade across the surface — deviation measured in exact figures, the drift quantified instantly. The lattice does not melt or flow; it is drawn, mechanically, line by line, in under 6 frames. Chromatic aberration spikes 3-4px on the ignition frame. Camera locked on full surface during lattice ignition. Mood: measurement as detonation event — the instant the lie becomes a number. gold telemetry lattice ignition, datapoint flares lighting, cascading numeric readout, deviation quantified, zero liquid simulation, chromatic aberration maximum, locked camera during ignition sequence

segments.text: The instant the lattice ignites, the lie ends. The structure snaps back onto its line. You were never lost. You were just unmeasured.
segments.visual_prompt: Sweeping high-acceleration vertical panoramic shot — camera drives upward along the gantry face at maximum velocity. As it rises, the entire steel structure snaps back onto its true vector: the cold grey (#8A8F98) edges align perfectly with the gold (#C6A94F) reference lines in a single hard mechanical correction — no easing, a discrete snap, the gap closing to zero in 2 frames. Gold HUD integrity readouts climb to ON VECTOR. Bone-white (#F5F2EB) light points reflect off the corrected surface at precise intervals. At the peak of the upward sweep (0:39) the camera locks on the gantry's apex: a knife-edge termination perfectly bisected by the gold vector line. Pure structural authority, instrumented. Mood: the architecture of correction the instant after measurement. high-acceleration vertical panoramic shot, hard mechanical snap to vector, gold reference alignment, ON VECTOR HUD readout, bone-white reflection points, knife-edge apex on gold line, absolute black void

segments.mobius_note: Final word 'always' must trail off into dead silence — no grammatical completion, no terminal inflection. ElevenLabs settings for this segment only: stability 0.55, style 0.0. On loop, 'the number was always' connects to 'telling you the truth.' completing the sentence.
segments.visual_prompt: Camera snaps to a dead-lock macro position on the gantry corner — same angular geometry as the hook frame, but now perfectly locked on the gold (#C6A94F) telemetry vector line, gap at zero. Gold diagnostic lattice frames the corner in a precise orthogonal grid, readouts at ON VECTOR. The frame holds this locked perfection for 3 seconds — the silence after correction. Then at exactly 0:44 a single razor-thin gold vector begins, almost imperceptibly, to separate from the steel edge again — the gap reopening by one measurable pixel as the lattice dims toward dormant. By 0:45 the geometry matches the hook frame's drifted state: same gap, same readout, same void. The loop is sealed — stop measuring and the drift resumes. Camera locked throughout. Mood: the inevitability of drift the instant telemetry stops. dead-lock macro gantry corner, locked on vector then imperceptible re-drift, gap reopening to frame zero, dimming lattice, gold diagnostic grid, loop seam visual match

elevenLabs_config.model_note: eleven_multilingual_v2 is the production-stable model used by generate-reel.ts. eleven_v3 is the newest model but is not yet wired into the with-timestamps pipeline — see remotion_compiler_directives.future_audio. Do not change the model_id here without updating the engine; this field is read by reel-plan.ts.

final_segment_override.note: Override on final segment only. 'always' must trail into suspension — zero terminal inflection. The sentence refuses to complete.

elevenLabs_config.voice_notes: speed: 1.05 forces aggressive delivery — 112 words in ~44 seconds. Clips must move at the voiceover's pace. DR_NKRUMAH_VOICE_ID hardcode in generate-reel.ts will override to C9Uh5MFptuXa176UlaXE regardless of spec voice_id.

subtitle_config.subtitle_law_note: v2.1 subtitle law: Cormorant Garamond, base weight 500, highlight 700, peak 700. This overrides the engine default (Montserrat). The .ass burn-in in generate-reel.ts reads color/highlight/peak below; font_family/font_weights are descriptive direction for the burn-in styling and the future Remotion compiler.

music_config.description: Cold telemetry techno. A measured pulse-bass at 124 BPM, like a heart monitor under load. Silence vacuums between sections — the pulse stops for 1-2 beats before the lattice-ignition stab, creating kinetic contrast. At 0:21 when the lattice ignites, a cascade of synchronized synth ticks fires with each numeric readout. No melodic elements. Pure percussive diagnostic architecture.
music_config.loop_seam_note: Single sustained sub-tone from 0:41-0:45, cuts to silence, flows into the lattice-ignition stab at 0:00 of loop 2.

instagram_config.caption:
Measurement is not judgment. It is the precondition of correction.

Drift feels like stillness because nothing is measuring it. A system without telemetry doesn't know it is falling.

The instant the number arrives, the lie ends. The structure snaps back onto its line.

You were never lost. You were just unmeasured.

#NkrumahDoctrine #SystemsArchitecture #KineticExecution #Discipline #NDCH
instagram_config.alt_text: A monolithic steel guidance gantry drifting off-axis in a black void until a gold telemetry lattice ignites, measures the deviation, and snaps the structure back onto its true vector — the architecture of correction through measurement.

audio_sync_validation.note: Descriptive contract for validate-reel.ts. The compiled voiceover word timings (from ElevenLabs with-timestamps) must align to segment boundaries within tolerance.
audio_sync_validation.subtitle_alignment: word-level timestamps drive .ass highlight timing; no subtitle line may exceed 2.0s on screen

visual_thread.note: The single continuous idea each segment must advance. Guards against disconnected clips.
visual_thread.thread: A measurable gap between the steel structure and its true gold vector line — opening (hook), unmeasured and widening (build), suddenly quantified (pivot), snapped to zero (resolution), reopening (mobius_close).
visual_thread.continuity_anchor: The gold vector line is present in every single segment. The gap between it and the steel is the protagonist.

sound_brief.note: Descriptive brief for the (future) music generation step. ffmpeg currently mixes a supplied bed.

seed_frame_strategy.note: Descriptive. For Runway image-to-video continuity (promptImage position 'first'). Not yet executed by generate-reel.ts; documented for the future chaining path on branch feat/runway-clip-chaining.
seed_frame_strategy.strategy: Each segment's final frame becomes the next segment's seed image to preserve gantry geometry across cuts. mobius_close final frame seeds the hook of loop 2 to guarantee the visual_seam match.
seed_frame_strategy.runway_image_to_video_note: When enabled, pass the previous clip's last frame as promptImage with position 'first'; keep promptText under the 512-character budget.

cover_frame_spec.rationale: 0:23 sits 2s into the pivot — the lattice is fully ignited and the deviation numbers are cascading. Maximum information density and gold-on-black contrast for the feed thumbnail.
cover_frame_spec.text_overlay: none — the cover is pure instrumented geometry
cover_frame_spec.safe_area_note: Keep the apex numeric readout clear of the bottom 420px Instagram UI safe zone.

remotion_compiler_directives.note: FUTURE / ASPIRATIONAL. Remotion is NOT installed in package.json and is NOT on the active render path — ffmpeg is the current executor. These are descriptive directives the future Remotion compiler will read. NO CLI strings, NO executable commands live here by design.
remotion_compiler_directives.future_audio: When eleven_v3 is wired in, the compiler will request character-level timestamps for tighter subtitle alignment; until then eleven_multilingual_v2 + word-level timestamps remain authoritative.
remotion_compiler_directives.future_overlay: remotion/src/SFM_HUD_Overlay.tsx is the intended overlay composition once a Root.tsx entry point and @remotion/* deps are added. Today the brand overlay is burned by ffmpeg.

timing_normalization.note: How fractional segment durations reconcile to exactly 45.0s total. Validator recomputes and checks.
timing_normalization.rounding_policy: Segment boundaries are whole seconds; any sub-second remainder from TTS is absorbed into the trailing silence of mobius_close, never the hook.

loop_seam_validation.note: Contract the validator checks for engine_version 2.1.0.
loop_seam_validation.expected_text_seam: ...the number was always... [LOOP] ...telling you the truth.
loop_seam_validation.visual_seam_geometry_match: mobius_close final frame gap == hook frame gap (drifted state); same macro angle, same void, same lattice position

derivation_audit.note: Provenance: how this instance was derived from reel_input. Lets the validator confirm the compiler did not silently mutate locked geometry.
derivation_audit.geometry_source: frame_geometry is fixed by TELEMETRY 014 law — not derived from input, asserted by it
derivation_audit.finish_source: color_palette, film_grain, chromatic_aberration derived from requested_style_family 'hud_covenant' (RUST REMIX finish law)
derivation_audit.script_source: voiceover.script authored to reel_input.concept_seed + doctrine_theme, constrained by pacing_lock and must_include
